notes: K=7 probe ran at ~214 KB/s (vs 1.5 MB/s target), triggering the spec's K=6 fallback after 47 s. K=6 sustained ~247 KB/s — well below the 1.5 MB/s pass-2 target — and the SIGALRM 300 s training cap fired at 60 MB ingested. DQ for train_time_exceeded; the arena-trie rewrite did not deliver the predicted 6-8x speedup over pass 1.
